paths.label: Full Rebuild Playbook
paths.description: All 27 lessons in module order. Covers every phase of Meridian from constraints to production readiness.

paths.label: Fast-Track Rebuild
paths.description: Skip the conceptual framing. Focus on implementation lessons. For learners who already know why and need the how.

paths.label: Security-First Track
paths.description: Covers the architecture decisions that matter most from a security standpoint: schema/RLS, auth, server hardening, AI safety, and efficacy.
